dialogueLines.text: Barry I understand why you're upset but I need you to listen.

choices.text: I'm upset because you're not being honest with me. - Barry
Ohhh, you think you understand why I'm upset right now. - Barry

dialogueLines.text: I'm being honest with you but you're not letting me talk.

choices.text: How am I not giving you time to talk, what am I doing so wrong? - Barry
How many more chances do I have to give you to talk?  You broke my stuff and stole my car! - Barry

dialogueLines.text: Can you just give me a chance to talk?

choices.text: How am I not giving you time to talk, what am I doing so wrong? - Barry
How many more chances do I have to give you to talk?  You broke my stuff and stole my car! - Barry

dialogueLines.text: You're being very aggressive and this is unlike you, do you want to talk or do you want to take a breather?

choices.text: You're talking to me like I'm not allowed to be upset over what happened. - Barry
I'm not even being aggressive, are you even taking responsibility here? - Barry

dialogueLines.text: You're acting like I broke everything in the house, this makes no sense.  Your car isn't even stolen, it's right there!  What is this aggressive attitude.

choices.text: You're talking to me like I'm not allowed to be upset over what happened. - Barry
I'm not even being aggressive, are you even taking responsibility here? - Barry

dialogueLines.text: You're allowed to be upset... I messed up and wanted to make it up to you but I think you're going too far now.

choices.text: Maybe I am a little over the top now.... - Barry
You don't get to tell me I'm allowed to be upset, I know what I'm allowed and not allowed to do. - Barry

dialogueLines.text: Taking responsibility?  Yeah sure I could take responsibility better but you shouldn't even be allowed to be acting like this reight now seriously.  This is so blown out of proportion.

choices.text: Maybe I am a little over the top now.... - Barry
You don't get to tell me I'm allowed to be upset, I know what I'm allowed and not allowed to do. - Barry

dialogueLines.text: Hey honestly I could have been a lot better myself.  I damaged something that didn't beling to me and I went behind your back and took your car but I promise I only had good intentions.

choices.text: Okay.. I believe you, I'm sorry for overreacting - Barry
You admitting what you did wrong doesn't make what you did any less wrong.  You broke something and went behind my back, for that I cannot forgive you. - Barry

dialogueLines.text: Okay you're actually freaking out now, I know what I did was wrong but you are seriously ruining everything we have in our friendship over something that can be bought at a store.  You hear yourself right?

choices.text: Okay.. I believe you, I'm sorry for overreacting - Barry
You admitting what you did wrong doesn't make what you did any less wrong.  You broke something and went behind my back, for that I cannot forgive you. - Barry
